name: Huawei Push Kit
description: Huawei Mobile Services push notification service for Android/HarmonyOS with batch and topic-based targeting.

seo.title: Huawei Push Kit — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Huawei Push Kit: Huawei Mobile Services push notification service for Android/HarmonyOS with batch and topic-based targeting.

when_to_use: Push notifications for Android apps targeting Huawei/HMS device users
Topic-based batch push for HarmonyOS app announcements
Transactional and marketing notifications via Huawei Push Kit SDK
Reaching Chinese Android users on Huawei devices without Google services

pros: Required for reliable push on Huawei/HarmonyOS
Free tier sufficient for most apps
Official vendor channel — no third-party risk
Topic-based targeting works out of the box
cons: Huawei-only — need FCM and others alongside
Console and docs have translation rough edges
review.verdict: A vendor channel, not a platform — wire it into your push provider for reliable Huawei delivery.
review.best_for: Teams with Huawei users who lose push via FCM outages
review.not_for: Anyone expecting a full marketing suite
